//: shared — internal library package consumed by both apps in this monorepo.
Contains DTOs, validation schemas, interfaces, and constants that must stay
in sync between the gateway (HTTP layer) and the expenses-service (business logic).
Has no runtime entry point — files are imported directly via the @shared/* path alias.
Never imported by its package name (@app/shared); always via the alias.
name: @app/shared
// private: Not published to npm; consumed only within this monorepo workspace.
